title: B.Ed Jobs 2026 – Guest Faculty
shortInfo: Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Dhenkanal (AHSSP Dhenkanal) has released a walk-in recruitment notification for Guest Faculty posts. Eligible candidates with Post Graduate qualification and B.Ed. can attend the walk-in interview scheduled on 10 and 11 June 2026 for contract-based teaching opportunities at the institution.

basic_details.job_title: AHSSP Dhenkanal Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Dhenkanal
basic_details.short_information: Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Dhenkanal (AHSSP Dhenkanal) has released a walk-in recruitment notification for Guest Faculty posts. Eligible candidates with Post Graduate qualification and B.Ed. can attend the walk-in interview scheduled on 10 and 11 June 2026 for contract-based teaching opportunities at the institution.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate with 55% marks and B.Ed.
qualification.details: Post Graduate with 55% marks and B.Ed.

faq.question: What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Anchaliika Higher Secondary School Pragyanvihar Dhenkanal (AHSSP Dhenkanal).

faq.question: What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Guest faculties.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest faculties post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post Graduate degree with 55% marks and a B.Ed. qualification.

faq.question: When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10-06-2026 for English, Odia, and Sanskrit, and on 11-06-2026 for Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biology(Botany).

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is Contractual.

faq.question: Where is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Dhenkanal, Odisha.

faq.question: What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their Biodata and all original certificates.

faq.question: Are there any specific age limits mentioned for the Guest faculties post?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data; candidates should refer to the official notification.
